get.description: Get created users at Benifex platform by employee IDs with pagination support

parameters.name: employeeIds
parameters.description: Unique employee identifiers used to filter the users being fetched from the Benifex platform

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Indicates the page number of the data to retrieve

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Specifies the number of user records to return per page

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Defines the media type expected in the response, usually set to application/json to receive JSON-formatted data

post.description: Create a new user on the Benifex platform

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Defines the media type expected in the response, usually set to application/json to receive JSON-formatted data

parameters.name: content-type
parameters.description: Indicates the media type of the body being sent in the request.

get.description: Get created user at Benifex platform

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: Specific ID of the user you want to get information about.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Defines the media type expected in the response, usually set to application/json to receive JSON-formatted data

patch.description: Update existing user at Benifex platform

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: Specific ID of the user you want to get information about.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Defines the media type expected in the response, usually set to application/json to receive JSON-formatted data

parameters.name: content-type
parameters.description: Indicates the media type of the body being sent in the request.

get.summary: Get detailed available and eligible-to-add benefits of user.
get.description: Returns details of current and eligible to add benefits for the requested user.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: Specific ID of the user you want to get information about.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Defines the media type expected in the response, usually set to application/json to receive JSON-formatted data

get.summary: Get summarized available and eligible-to-add benefits of user.
get.description: Returns current and eligible to add benefits for the requested user.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: Specific ID of the user you want to get information about.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Defines the media type expected in the response, usually set to application/json to receive JSON-formatted data

get.description: Returns details of single benefit of the requested user.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: Specific ID of the user you want to get information about.

parameters.name: benefit-key
parameters.description: Specific key used to identify which benefit information you want to retrieve for the given user.
